description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and the docker tag runner. Define a single build stage. Add a build_staging job in the build stage that inherits a before_script running "docker version", "docker info", and "docker login -u $CI_BUILD_LOGIN -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY", and an after_script running "docker logout $CI_REGISTRY". The job's script exports SLACK_CHANNEL, VK_CONFIRMATION_TOKEN, SLACK_BOT_SECRET, SLACK_TEXT, and SERVER_PATH from CI variables, then builds a Docker image with "docker build -t ${CI_REGISTRY}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}:latest --pull ." and pushes it with "docker push ${CI_REGISTRY}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}:latest".
